description_long: This is a single-story, modern-style house surrounded by a low perimeter wall and landscaped with several palm trees and shrubs. The house features a flat roof and a rectangular layout, with a visible driveway leading to a carport or garage area. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the property includes a paved front yard and a small backyard area. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a short walkway, and is accentuated by minimalistic landscaping and a clean, open design.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light exterior walls, palm trees, and a driveway leading to a carport. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features asymmetrical windows and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated front-left angle, highlighting the driveway, carport, and main entryway, as well as the palm trees and front landscaping.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct side view, emphasizing the flat roof, the length of the house, and the arrangement of windows and backyard area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the rear, showing the backyard, rear wall, and additional landscaping, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a right-side perspective, focusing on the side yard, the continuation of the flat roof, and the distribution of windows along the side facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a short walkway, minimal steps, and no porch; flanked by landscaping and open to the driveway.
